case_title: TERRANCE HEATH et al VS. BARBARA FEDUN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 AT 10:30 A.M. IS RESET TO MAY-01-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE BRUCE E. CHAN - THE PARTIES APPEARED, BUT THE MATTER WAS UNABLE TO BE HEARD AT 10:30 A.M. CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEATH, TERRANCE HEATH, LAURA HILDRED, JEREMY WHEELER, BROOKE BOTELLO, BENITO BOTELLO, CLAIRE PAKHOMOVA, VICTORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FEDUN, BARBARA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HEATH, TERRANCE HEATH, LAURA HILDRED, JEREMY WHEELER, BROOKE BOTELLO, BENITO BOTELLO, CLAIRE PAKHOMOVA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT FEDUN, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEATH, TERRANCE HEATH, LAURA HILDRED, JEREMY WHEELER, BROOKE BOTELLO, BENITO BOTELLO, CLAIRE PAKHOMOVA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT FEDUN, BARBARA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDUN, BARBARA
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING BY THE DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-01-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-02-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEDUN, BARBARA

PLAINTIFFS ARE PRESENT, EXCEPT FOR LAURA HEATH AND CLAIRE BOTELLO. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. THE PARTIES ARE SWORN. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2009 BY BRUCE E. CHAN. JUDGE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 514)
